revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#if: {{{before|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reat...'
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#if: {{{before|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:S-bef/check]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 65110 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: allow bold or italics in check for "New constituency"
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: second run of importing xml edited files to get rid of the bad category
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 5 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:S-bef/check]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']]
<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 7 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Main other | <!-- -->{{#if: {{{1|}}} |<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><!-- --><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Main other | {{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH |ignore_errors=true}} | NOMATCH||}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|}}} |pattern=^'*[Nn]ew constituency'*$ |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH|| }}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']] [[Category:S-bef: 'before' parameter is 'New constituency']] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
